noticeTemplate: This educational material references {work_title} by {authors}. All referenced content is used under Fair Use (17 U.S.C. § 107) for educational purposes. {additional_notes} We encourage you to purchase this work directly from {creator_link}.

additionalNotes.transformative: Content is transformed for interactive educational use, not reproduced verbatim. Skills are reframed as hands-on learning activities.
additionalNotes.amount: Only factual techniques and historically documented methods are referenced, not creative expression or verbatim prose.
additionalNotes.marketEffect: This educational pack actively encourages purchase of the original works. Creator-first purchase links are prioritized throughout.
additionalNotes.purpose: Educational and non-commercial use for cultural preservation and heritage skills instruction.

creatorSupportStatement: The Heritage Skills Educational Pack directs all learners to purchase original works from their creators. Foxfire works should be purchased from foxfire.org to support the Foxfire Fund and its ongoing educational mission in Rabun Gap, Georgia.
foxfireSpecificGuidance: The Foxfire Fund is a nonprofit educational organization. Purchasing from foxfire.org directly supports mountain youth education programs and the preservation of Appalachian mountain culture. The Foxfire Museum and Heritage Center in Mountain City, Georgia, is also recommended as a direct cultural resource.
